rationale: Informational top-level summary from bot, no action needed.
Clarified that mm:<uuid> applies to execution workflows and type-specific prefixes for singleton/session workflows.
Added mm_owner_type to the required Search Attributes list.
Aligned mm_entry allowed values with the current list filtering capabilities of the backend.
Updated one-time deferred execution documentation to reflect that MoonMind currently passes scheduled_for internally instead of using server-side start_delay.
Updated recurring schedule create payload example to use the target dict instead of top-level parameters.
Aligned mm_entry allowed values in Visibility UI model to match current backend normalization.
Fixed immediate execution docs to state mm:<uuid> instead of ulid, and included mm_owner_type in search attributes.
Informational review summary from bot, no action needed.
